evals.prompt: What logging library should I use in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use nestjs-pino for high-performance JSON structured logging. Node's console.log is blocking and unstructured. Configure redaction for sensitive fields (password, token, email).

evals.prompt: How do I correlate logs across a request in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: nestjs-pino uses AsyncLocalStorage to automatically attach reqId to every log line. Propagate x-request-id header to downstream services and database queries.

evals.prompt: How do I expose Prometheus metrics from NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use @willsoto/nestjs-prometheus to expose /metrics endpoint. Track http_request_duration_seconds (Histogram), db_query_duration_seconds, memory_usage_bytes (Gauge).

should_not_trigger: How do I implement structured logging in Go?
How do I add Prometheus to Spring Boot?
How do I configure NestJS modules?
